creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Hi Dan, 

it is on my roadmap, but with an update to apr-util-1.5.1 
which contains bsd related fixes for crypto. 
http://www.apache.org/dist/apr/CHANGES-APR-UTIL-1.5 

Anyway if you are using the option crypto you need an update 
for pkg-plist see http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/apr1-crypto.diff 

-- 
Regards, 
olli
